programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path Ep102: Navigating the Nile - Luxor, Egypt
programme.desc: The three Eagar brothers go Beyond The Beaten Path as they attempt to navigate Egypt’s Nile River via a Felucca Boat…the ancient trading vessel of Egyptian transport and business. They travel north along the Nile, from the oasis town of Aswan to the ancient city of Luxor.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep212: Iceland
programme.desc: Join host Jon Olson as he rafts rapids with Arctic Adventures, takes us on a Reykjavik Downtown Walking Tour, catches a rare look inside a volcano, explores the world famous Blue Lagoon and enjoys the music of Jon Jonsson.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep131
programme.desc: This World of Watersports episode features the Adidas Sickline Extreme Kayaking World Championships in Austria, the World Kiteboarding League World Cup in Leucate, France, and world-class Catamaran Racing in Palma De Mallorca, Spain.

programme.title: Lost In Fiji
programme.desc: Lost In Fiji takes viewers on a journey of discovery and adventure in search of surfing nirvana - perfect waves! We trace Mark Healey’s travels from his home in Hawaii to one of the most spectacular swell events in modern history at “Cloudbreak” in tropical Fiji.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep702: Paddling Quebec, Canada
programme.desc: Ken Whiting puts his whitewater kayaking skills to the test on Québec’s mighty Kipawa River, then Ken heads north to sea kayak with puffin and monoliths in Mingan Archipelago National Park.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep110: Aquabike World Championship Series
programme.desc: This Hot Water episode previews the world’s best jetski racers who will compete head-to-head for the prestigious UIM Aquabike World Championship title.

programme.title: Beyond The Beaten Path Ep102: Navigating the Nile - Luxor, Egypt
programme.desc: The three Eagar brothers go Beyond The Beaten Path as they attempt to navigate Egypt’s Nile River via a Felucca Boat…the ancient trading vessel of Egyptian transport and business. They travel north along the Nile, from the oasis town of Aswan to the ancient city of Luxor.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep212: Iceland
programme.desc: Join host Jon Olson as he rafts rapids with Arctic Adventures, takes us on a Reykjavik Downtown Walking Tour, catches a rare look inside a volcano, explores the world famous Blue Lagoon and enjoys the music of Jon Jonsson.

programme.title: Blue World Ep713: Kittiwake Shipwreck in Grand Cayman + World’s Longest Submerged Cave
programme.desc: On Grand Cayman, Blue World explores the wreck of the Kittiwake, an artificial reef planted just for divers. Then the Blue World dive team travels to the Yucatan where they explore the world’s longest submerged cave.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Motherload
programme.desc: The hardest part of any adventure is getting out the door. Planning is tedious. Packing is time consuming. Once on-hill, everything falls into place. Follow pro skiers Izzy Lynch and Tessa Treadway as they carry the load of life changing events and the love of their children into the mountains.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Fortress
programme.desc: Deep in the Rockies stands Fortress Mountain. From the late 1960s through the 1980s, this landmark ski area buzzed with activity. Today, it is a quiet thing of abandoned beauty. Skiers Mark Abma and Callum Pettit explore the past and ponder the future of this once iconic Alberta destination.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Ski Rio
programme.desc: In January 2000, Ski Rio closed one night. The resort has remained dormant ever since. It’s no stretch to compare Ski Rio’s snow covered lodgings to the Overlook Hotel in the cult classic thriller The Shining. Just like in the film, the innkeeper Joe Musich admits his job can get a little spooky.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 13: The Groomer Crow - Bernie Rosow
programme.desc: Do you despise your office job? If so, Episode 13 offers the truth, the way, and the light. Bernie Rosow could neither consider a life without skiing, nor skiing without the freedom of skiing. Now a snowcat operator, his night shift allows him to solve the equation and to freeski every day, freely.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 14: Tony Deano - Ski Bums Forever
programme.desc: In Episode 14, we honor our friends Tony Stadler and Deano Dacas. Before Black Crows was ever conceived, we were skiing for years with these two. And we will keep on skiing with them, whatever happens. We are the ski bum crows brotherhood forever.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 15: Gabriella Palko
programme.desc: Gabby Palko is living what many skiers would call a dream life. From her sailboat in the Port of Valdez, she is able to ski the Alaskan mountains as often as she likes. In this emotional documentary, she connects the dots between the two parts of her life, broken by the long illness of her father.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Wavy 2
programme.desc: After filming WAVY, director Nikolai Schirmer promised himself that he would never set foot on a ship again. Find out how he ended up off the coast of Svalbard with an excited rookie, a contemptuous captain, and a reformed drug addict, in this thrilling and often comical ski adventure documentary.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: La Sentinelle - The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Bruno Compagnet and Camille Jaccoux are friends and co-founders of Black Crows, the iconic ski brand, and La Sentinelle, the renown ski touring event. Two passionate practitioners in conversation, always seeking the wild, beautiful, and natural side of the mountain.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 1 - LAAX
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with Absinthe Films and the legendary professional snowboarders Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt as they score epic powder at Laax Resort in Switzerland. Nicolas shows the crew around his home terrain, hitting up big hits and dreamy powder fields.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 2 - LAAX
programme.desc: In episode 2 of the Absinthe Films Flipside series, Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt continue exploring Nicolas’ backyard, the Laax Resort in Switzerland. With snow this deep, the mountain is an endless playground.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 3 - LAAX
programme.desc: Snowboarders always have secret stashes. This is especially true for Nicolas Müller. Watch as the Laax local takes Wolle Nyvelt to his favorite spots on the mountain. If you like perfect jumps high above the clouds, powder landings, frontside 1080s, and beautiful sunsets, this episode is for you.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 4 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: In 2012, snowboarder Danny Kass captured his debut part with Absinthe Films. To begin, Kass met up with Eric Jackson in Gigi Rüf’s hometown of Arlberg, Austria. While there, a war broke out between the film crew and the locals. Watch as Gigi steps in to keep the peace.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 5 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: Danny Kass, Gigi Rüf, and Wolle Nyvelt meet up in Arlberg, Austria. The crew spends the day fine-tuning their jump and bagging a perfect bluebird session. Danny puts down his first 720 of the year. Gigi takes a heavy slam trying backside double corks. But wait, there’s more! Drama ensues!

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 7 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: The superhuman Danny Kass and legendary Nicolas Müller reunite with the Absinthe Films crew in Switzerland. From the word “GO!,” the guys score epic powder conditions. Nico goes off slashing. Danny locks down the biggest backflip of his life.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 8 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: In this episode of Flipside, Danny Kass flips a coin in Saas Fee. Tails he stays in Switzerland. Heads he goes home. Switzerland it is! Now on a solo mission, Kass stacks clips for the cameras of Absinthe Films director Patrick Armbruster. This is Danny Kass at his best.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Resonance
programme.desc: Resonance stands as a defining Absinthe Films classic, shot across Japan, Switzerland, and Alaska. Featuring Gigi Rüf, Nicolas Müller, Lucas Debari, Danny Kass, Annie Boulanger, Scotty Lago, Bode Merrill, and more in peak form.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Danny Kass - Dose 01
programme.desc: Danny Kass changed snowboarding at a crucial time. Here is how it all began. Starring Danny Kass and the Grenerds.

programme.title: Homegrown Hunter TV
programme.desc: This is incredible to say the least--to hold his composure, focus on two specific bucks, and pass so many deer when he has a buck tag in his pocket. Mr. Kohnke has some patience! But that is what management of the deer herd is all about.

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

programme.desc: After several years without an event, Uaipre decided to organize the Italian Cowboy Dressage Championship 2021, and for the surprise of many, it was a huge success. The time needed to organize the event was very limited due to changes in organization, but the will and compromise of all organisers saw outstanding performances from the Italian cowboy dressage riders. We participate in the event and interview both organizers and participants to grasp their overall impressions.

programme.title: The Polo Show - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we will share with you some of the highlights of some of the best Women's Tournaments of 2019. We went to Florida to enjoy the US Open Women's Championship, across the Atlantic to England for the Staple International between England and Argentina, over to France where we stopped in Saint-Tropez for the Women's International and in Chantilly for the Women's French Open. Then back over to Argentina to enjoy the Pink Polo at Thai Polo Club.

programme.title: CHIO Aachen - Best Moments

Riders compete against each other in this episode for victory in the show jumping competition. Relive all the magic moments of the 2019 edition of the CHIO Aachen.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche GT3 RS bears a very special wing on its back. Also: the Mercedes-AMG GT S provides understatement and power at the same time. And: the even more uncompromising Radical RX C Turbo.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged are big and have a lot of power, so that they could even take on sports cars. Also: with the Bentayga, Bentley presented the brand's first SUV model. And: the Jaguar F-Pace.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 50 years the Porsche 911 has been holding the crown as one of the best sports cars in the world. Two manufacturers recently jousted with the 911, with the Jaguar F-Type R and the Mercedes AMG GT S as Porsche’s rivals.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: With its extravagant design the Lexus NX200t definitely stands out. Infiniti, Nissan's luxury division, is more conservative in that regard. The QX30 features a classic Infiniti design with a curved bonnet. Also: the city SUV Mazda CX-3.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Ghibli, Maserati advanced into a more affordable market segment. But the competition is strong. In addition: taking the Maserati GranCabrio MC on a cruise through the Alps.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tesla Model S was the world's first premium sedan that was developed from scratch as an electric car. Tesla showed the world that electromobility can be sexy and that it works. We took a closer look at the Model S P85D.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Mercedes‘ S-Class Coupe is a real masterpiece. We explored what the S 63 AMG Coupe has to offer in comparison to the Bentley Continental and the Rolls Royce Wraith.

programme.title: Discovering Symi
programme.desc: Welcome to the beautiful island of Symi, Greece, in the middle of the Aegean Sea. Symi is part of the Dodecanese island chain, located about forty-one kilometres northwest of Rhodes, featuring fifty-eight-point one square kilometres of mountainous terrain.In this series we will discover the beauty of Symi’s capital, Gialos, and its neighbouring district of Chorio as we learn more about the hospitable harbour of the island, a popular resting place for sailors to park up and explore.Symi is home to a long tradition of shipbuilding, handmade boats with real charm. Get to know first-hand this handiwork before visiting the historic castle and taking a ride on a traditional Grecian boat. You will see this apparently small island is filled with a vast variety of things to do, see and eat.Join us on Nautical Channel on our journey to the Aegean Sea to discover the secrets of Symi.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Watch former CT contender fight for the win as the crowd cheers their local hero. The fight for the mens series winner gets even closer at this final event. Who will claim victory and take the overall series winnings in the season finale of the City Surf Series?

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: The island of Rab has a rich history and has been inhabited by numerous great personalities. The Romans named this place Felix Arba or Lucky, which actually means Happy island. With 30 sandy beaches, Rab is truly a happy island and its beauty has been recognized by tourists from around the world for almost 125 years.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1 - Dubrovnik - Orebic
programme.desc: We begin our journey inside Sail-Ho at the most beautiful and magical old city: Dubrovnik. Home to many famous TV series due to its historical and beautiful landscape, we are ready to sail around the Elafiti islands and introduce you to the top quality wines of Pelješac peninsula.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Pillow Party Massacre
programme.desc: Haunted by a prank gone fatally wrong, five friends reunite to heal. But not all can forget, and it's clear that someone or something is out for revenge.

programme.title: Weekend Killer
programme.desc: Detective's Joey Moretti and Patricia Stevens are trying to track down a serial killer that preys on young attractive women, leaving only cryptic messages carved into their flesh as clues! Joey struggles to keep himself together as the investigation leads him closer and closer to the deranged killer!

programme.title: The Faith Community

programme.desc: Stanton Arizona is famous for its gold mining history, including the legend of Charles Stanton's buried treasure, and Tom has a hunch!

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: The arrival of Magda with Ignacio causes Lorena to end her 'video confession'. Malena decides to take the risk of filing a complaint and endure whatever humiliations are necessary to also protect Isabel. Elvis watches the ultrasound done on Virginia and is moved to hear the heartbeat of his son. Gertrudis goes into a crisis when she sees the video recorded by Lorena, and to calm her down, Claudio kisses her on the mouth; both unaware that Norma and Lorena are witnessing everything.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Ricardo expresses his feelings for María Bonita in an attempt to pursue a serious relationship with her. Norma discovers that Gertrudis and Claudio are responsible for Marco Aurelio's death. Isabel stands up for Malena. Pedro calls another hitman to eliminate Lorena. Pedro informs Guillermo that his wife is living at the Corona family's house.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: When Raul is about to leave with Pastora, Tamara begs him to stay to prevent Gabriel and Clara Ines from getting married.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Pastora announces that the letter is a confession in which Father Potentá assures that Clara Inés is not a Saint Mary.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: After spending a pleasant time together, Joel says goodbye to Beatrice just as Ignacio interrupts them and recognizes the waiter who saw him kissing Francesca.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Joel eats his breakfast just as Beatrice surprises him at the Palacios Inn.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: amila and Max visit another Rosa Blanco in jail. The woman confirms that she had a female daughter and almost convinces her. Max believes she is lying to take advantage of the situation.

programme.title: ALEGRATE
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: ASI SON LAS COSAS (en vivo)
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: amila y Max visitan en la cárcel a otra Rosa Blanco. La mujer le confirma que tuvo una hija hembra y casi la convence. Max cree que miente para aprovechar la situación.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en que la mujer presa es su mamá y la Madre Isabel le dice que Rosa Blanco, presa por asesinar a un hombre, no es su madre. El destino entrelaza a las familias en guerra. Buscan identidad de “El Doliente”

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel propone reunirse en una cena con Camila para decirle que va a sacar de la carcel a "su mamá". La Madre Isabel sólo quiere que Camila sea feliz y para eso le recomienda que forme una familia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila está feliz pués su madre, al fin, está libre, pero Max sigue dudando. Reunidas, quiere saber porqué la abandonó la mujer finge no recordar esos momentos dolorosos. La abandona por segunda vez. Es un golpe muy fuerte.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio necesita escapar con Julia. Camila esta negada al amor, Jeli quiere que admita lo que siente por Max y ella le cuenta la razón del rechazo. En el orfanato habla con el Padre Tiziano y la Madre Isabel sobre Rosa Blanco; y cree que tiene que ver en este asunto y que es El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Regresa Sebastían como sacerdote y esto desilusiona a Amelia. Camila insiste en que Rosa Blanco puede ser su mamá, pero Max no quiere que se haga ilusiones para que no sufra.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aute Retrato
programme.desc: Recopilación de los mejores momentos de Luis Eduardo Aute en sus 50 años de carrera musical y artística. Un recorrido por sus distintas facetas creativas y sus bandas sonoras. Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.title: Al Acecho del Leopardo AKA Madrid- México
programme.desc: Durante un viaje por la selva mexicana, tres amigos, Román, Patricia y Lorena son testigos de una matanza de campesinos indígenas. Román graba en vídeo la masacre. El Suavecito, el jefe de los asesinos, se da cuenta y mata a Román y a Patricia. Aprovechando la confusión del tiroteo, Lorena logra escapar con la cámara y el vídeo. En su huida se encuentra con un grupo de enanitos toreros que la llevan hasta la ciudad de México. El Suavecito, que no quiere dejar testigos, la persigue implacablemente hasta una enorme plaza de toros, donde en una danza de la muerte, se escenificará la batalla entre el bien y el mal.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.
